3200860.name: Ink Escape: Coven Conundrum Demo
3200860.description:
When your grandmother died, you were inconsolable. Now you just want to feel a bit closer to her. One mishap and you are stuck with your newly acquired ink friend and the magic found between the pages of your inherited books.

This is a first person escape room game. As the player, you will go through new books and environments to discover different stories, while solving puzzles and gathering the components necessary to leave. Enjoy a peek into the first chapter of the story!


In this Demo you'll find:

  • Gorgeously animated puzzles, with unique mechanics
  • A newly found and unusual friend
  • A sneak peak into the Ink escape Universe, where a new book opens a new environment to explore
  • and more!
3200860.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
